query: audit and close remaining phase 2 and 2.x gaps

results.title: Milestone gap closure phases for v1.0 audit
results.content: Milestone audit gaps were converted into eight closure phases. Phases 07-13 each backfill milestone-grade VERIFICATION.md evidence for original phases 0-6, and phase 14 cleans planning debt (stale REQUIREMENTS checkboxes, traceability drift, Phase 1 summary drift, and stale handoff artifacts). REQUIREMENTS traceability now points orphaned v1 requirements to phases 07-13 and billing checkboxes were reset to unchecked because the milestone audit marks all 28 requirements as unsatisfied until VERIFICATION artifacts exist.

results.title: Phase 14 audit-alignment execution pattern
results.content: Final planning-audit-alignment execution should stay metadata-only: mark all completed v1 requirements as checked, keep traceability pointing to closure phases 07-13, remove stale non-v1 IDs from Phase 1 summary metadata, delete stale HANDOFF/.continue-here artifacts, and add a short 14-VERIFICATION plus 14-01-SUMMARY. After phase complete, manually patch STATE/ROADMAP/PROJECT body text because phase-complete updates frontmatter more reliably than narrative sections.

results.title: Milestone audit passed after closure phases
results.content: After completing phases 07 through 14, the v1.0 milestone audit can pass with requirements 28/28, phases 15/15, integration 4/4, and flows 4/4. The key prerequisites were: dedicated VERIFICATION.md artifacts for original phases 0-6, REQUIREMENTS.md checkboxes and traceability realigned to closure phases, Phase 1 summary metadata cleaned, stale HANDOFF/.continue-here artifacts removed, and a refreshed milestone audit file committed.

results.title: Phase 14 planning pattern
results.content: Phase 14 should be planned as a planning-debt cleanup phase, not feature work. The plan should read the milestone audit, REQUIREMENTS.md, Phase 1 summary, and stale resume artifacts, then clean four audit-facing issues: stale v1 requirement checkboxes, stale traceability table, Phase 1 summary over-claiming AUTH-03/AUTH-04/VAL-01, and leftover HANDOFF/.continue-here artifacts. The plan should use a single execute plan with no new research and no runtime-code changes.

results.title: Progress after pull on master
results.content: After pulling master to 7cfc304 on 2026-03-30, roadmap/progress shows 16/16 plans complete across phases 00-06 and milestone v1.0 implementation is effectively done. However progress is blocked by verification debt: audit-uat reports 12 unresolved UAT items across phases 03/04/05 (10 pending, 2 server-blocked), HANDOFF.json points next work to milestone verification closure, and milestone audit status is gaps_found because all 7 phases lack VERIFICATION.md artifacts. Recommended next step is verification/audit work before milestone archival, not new feature planning.
